bids.reasoning: At the opening with no opponent offers or messages yet, I am targeting my maximum utility bid. Since there is no time pressure at t=0.0, I should start firm on my preferred values across all issues and wait for the opponent’s response.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a very high-utility bid while making a small concession to avoid simply repeating my opening offer. The opponent’s only offer was all valueA, which is the lowest utility for me on every issue and does not yet show meaningful concession, so I will hold firm especially on the high-weight issues D and E.

I am targeting a very high-utility bid (~0.98) because it is still extremely early at t=0.04, so there is little reason to make major concessions yet. The opponent has moved from an all-low offer to a bid worth about 0.56 to me, showing some concession, and I can reciprocate slightly on a low-weight issue while holding firm on the high-weight issues D and E.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.96 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is little need to make large concessions yet. The opponent briefly offered a bid worth about 0.56 to me but then reverted to all valueA, so their behavior looks inconsistent rather than steadily conceding. I will concede only on lower-weight issues issueA and issueB while holding firm on the important issues issueC, issueD, and issueE.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.96 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is little reason to concede on the high-weight issues issueD and issueE. The opponent has mostly offered all valueA, with only one more reasonable bid that still asked for large concessions on issueD and issueC, so I am making a small concession only on a low-weight issue while avoiding repeating my exact previous bid.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.94 while making concessions only on low-weight issues A and B. The opponent’s offers mostly remain very low for me and do not show reliable concession, so I should hold firm on the high-importance issues C, D, and E while avoiding an exact repeat of my last bid.

I targeted a high utility bid around 0.92 because it is still early at t=0.12 and the opponent has not shown a reliable pattern of meaningful concession. Their offers are mostly very low for my utility, so I am only conceding on my lowest-weight issues, issueA and issueB, while holding firm on the high-weight issues issueC, issueD, and issueE.

At t=0.14 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 while making limited concessions on the low-weight issues A and B. The opponent’s offers mostly remain low for my utility, with only occasional movement on issueE and issueB, so I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues D and E and also keep C strong for now.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.90 because it is still early at t=0.16 and the opponent has not shown a reliable concession trend; most of their offers remain very low utility to me, with only occasional movement on issueE or issueD. I am conceding on the lower-weight issueA while holding firm on the high-weight issues issueC, issueD, and issueE, and I avoid exactly repeating my previous bid.

I am targeting a still-high utility around 0.88 because it is early in the negotiation, so I should only concede on low-weight issues while holding firm on issueC, issueD, and issueE. The opponent’s offers remain much worse for me overall, though their latest bid improved issueE to valueD, so I read some movement but not enough to justify major concessions yet.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.86 because it is still early at t=0.20 and the opponent’s offers remain very low for me, with only small concessions mostly on issueE and little movement on my high-weight issueD. I will concede mainly on low-weight issueA and issueB while holding issueC, issueD, and issueE at my best values, and I am avoiding an exact repeat of my previous bid.

I am targeting a high-utility bid of about 0.84 because it is still early at t=0.22 and the opponent’s recent offers remain very low for my utility with limited consistent concession. Since there are no messages and the offer history suggests they often push low values on issueA/issueB, I concede mainly on my lowest-weight issues while holding firm on issueC, issueD, and issueE.

At t=0.24 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.80 rather than making large concessions. The opponent’s offers remain low for my utility and inconsistent, with only small movement on issueD/issueE, so I will keep my highest-weight issues D and E at valueE while conceding A/B fully and slightly softening issueC.
